item.title: Self-Powered Analogue Neuromorphic System for Multimodal Sensing, Encoding and Learning with Diffusive and Drift Memristors
item.description:
Nature Sensors, Published online: 30 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s44460-026-00067-7

A self-powered analogue neuromorphic system built from diffusive and drift memristors performs multimodal sensing, encoding and learning without external power.
